quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. "Gadget was $273.06, or 12.89%, higher" and "North exceeded West by $761.53, or 53.82%".

specificity.why: Every recommendation names concrete products/regions and figures, e.g. "Test North-specific promotions; North produced $2,176.35, 30.42% of revenue and 53.82% more than West".

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations such as top-two product concentration ("$4,510.94, or 63.05%") and "North Gadget orders generated $747.50 (10.45% of total), compounding the leading region and product concentration".
